'''鈭歵h-g-p-h''' ('''kathagpehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:voudou|voudou]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-g-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:voudou|voudou]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-g-p-h
|-
! Lemma
| kathagpehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithagpehoko|thithagpehoko]] || [[word:jithagpehoko|jithagpehoko]] || [[word:shithagpehoko|shithagpehoko]] || [[word:kithagpehoko|kithagpehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothagpehoko|thothagpehoko]] || [[word:jothagpehoko|jothagpehoko]] || [[word:shothagpehoko|shothagpehoko]] || [[word:kothagpehoko|kothagpehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thagpehoko|th忙thagpehoko]] || [[word:j忙thagpehoko|j忙thagpehoko]] || [[word:sh忙thagpehoko|sh忙thagpehoko]] || [[word:k忙thagpehoko|k忙thagpehoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathagpehoko|thathagpehoko]] || [[word:jathagpehoko|jathagpehoko]] || [[word:shathagpehoko|shathagpehoko]] || [[word:kathagpehoko|kathagpehoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
